title: Garden Route Dam level at 43.75%
bodyText:
GEORGE NEWS -  The latest dam level update, supplied by George Municipality on 4 February:

Garden Route Dam Level

- Dam level: 43,75 %  (Compared to 44.77% on 27 January)
- Rainfall: 0.5 mm (Measured from 26 January – 2 February)

Haarlem Dam Level

- Dam level: 21,00 % (Compared to 24,00 % on 27 January)
- Rainfall: 0 mm (Measured from 26 January - 2 February)

The Level 2D water restrictions implemented currently can be found here.

The cooperation of all users of municipal water is essential and is greatly appreciated.

ALSO READ: George Municipal requests to be declared a water-scarce area.

Households are limited to 10 kilolitres per month under Level 2D.


> Use above this limit will be billed at Level 3 Emergency Tariffs.


Small daily savings, shorter showers, fewer washes, using grey water, can make a big difference.

NOW READ: Raw water sources are being sought in George and surrounds


## Report leaks or misuse:


- 044 801 9262 / 66 | 044 801 6300
- Violations: 044 801 6350 | 044 801 6300

Previous articles:

- Garden Route Dam level at 44.77%
- Garden Route Dam level at 45,36%
- Garden Route Dam level at 43,48%
- Garden Route Dam level at 46,63%
- Garden Route Dam level at 47.65%

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
